title: Sh@dey'uwr #7707
definition:
Shedeur = "darter of light"

 1) father of Elizur, chief of the tribe of Reuben at the time of the
    exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shedeur = "darter of light"

 1) father of Elizur, chief of the tribe of Reuben at the time of the
    exodus

    NASB:  a Reubenite
